examples.title: Algorithm: Painting in Swing
examples.code:
PROCEDURE paintComponent(Graphics g)
 CALL super.paintComponent(g)
 SET background color
 SET foreground color
 DRAW shapes or text
END PROCEDURE
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps for painting in Swing.

examples.title: Java: Painting in Swing
examples.description: Java code for painting in Swing
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates how to create a custom component and override the paintComponent method for custom painting.

examples.title: Java: Painting in Swing with Graphics2D
examples.description: Java code for painting in Swing using Graphics2D
examples.explanation: This Java code demonstrates how to use Graphics2D for advanced 2D graphics operations, such as anti-aliasing.
